name: Incorrect Authorization
description: The product performs an authorization check when an actor attempts to access a resource or perform an action, but the check is implemented incorrectly, allowing attackers to bypass access controls and reach protected resources or functionality.
detection_pattern: INGRESS[request] passes through AUTH[authorization_check] that contains flawed logic (incorrect comparison, missing edge cases, bypassable conditions) before reaching STORAGE[protected_resource] or TRANSFORM[privileged_action], allowing unauthorized access despite the presence of a check
